languages.text: "Собирайте пожитки. Будете служить на моем корабле".

traits.locale_text: "Собирайте пожитки. Будете служить на моем корабле".

languages.text: "Collect your belongings. You will live and serve aboard my vessel."
languages.original_text: "Собирайте пожитки. Будете служить на моем корабле".

traits.locale_text: "Collect your belongings. You will live and serve aboard my vessel."
"Collect your belongings. You will live and serve aboard my vessel."
"Collect your belongings. You will live and serve aboard my vessel."

languages.text: "Sammelt eure Habseligkeiten ein. Ihr werdet an Bord meines Schiffes leben und dienen."
languages.original_text: "Collect your belongings. You will live and serve aboard my vessel."

languages.text: "Rassemblez vos affaires. Vous vivrez et servirez à bord de mon navire."
languages.original_text: "Collect your belongings. You will live and serve aboard my vessel."

languages.text: "收拾好你们的行李你们将在我的船上生活和服务"
languages.original_text: "Collect your belongings. You will live and serve aboard my vessel."

languages.text: "Recoge tus pertenencias. Vivirás y servirás a bordo de mi nave".
languages.original_text: "Collect your belongings. You will live and serve aboard my vessel."

languages.text: 「荷物をまとめろ。私の船で暮らし、仕えるのだ"
languages.original_text: "Collect your belongings. You will live and serve aboard my vessel."

languages.text: "Eşyalarınızı toplayın. Gemimde yaşayacak ve hizmet edeceksiniz."
languages.original_text: "Collect your belongings. You will live and serve aboard my vessel."
